product_information.product_name: Dr. Organic Moroccan Argan Oil Conditioner 265 ML
product_information.description:
Het Product
This Moroccan Argan Oil Conditioner is an intensely moisturising treatment designed to restore, soften, and revitalise dry or damaged hair. Infused with organic moroccan argan oil, rich in essential fatty acids and antioxidants, it deeply nourishes and strengthens hair from root to tip. The luxurious formula helps detangle, smooth, and add shine, leaving hair feeling soft, manageable, and beautifully conditioned.
Ingredienten
Aqua, Aloe Barbadensis leaf juice powder†, Cetearyl alcohol, Distearoyethyl dimonium chloride, Glyceryl stearate, Glycerin, Coco- caprylate, *ARGANIA SPINOSA KERNEL OIL (KEY ACTIVE: Moroccan Argan Oil) †, Olea Europaea (Olive) Fruit Oil†, Argania Spinosa Kernel Extract†, Hibiscus Sabdariffa Flower Extract†, Kigelia Africana Fruit Extract†, Adansonia Digitata Fruit Extract†, Triticum Vulgare (Wheat) Germ Oil, Parfum, Tocopherol, Guar Hydroxypropyltrimonium Chloride, Citric acid, Sodium phytate, Benzyl alcohol, Sodium benzoate, Dehydroacetic acid, Potassium sorbate, Limonene. † certified organic 10% organic, 98% natural origin
